_note: When adding a new vulnerability type not already in VulnType, see docs/benchmark-management.md#updating-when-you-add-a-new-vulnerability-type for the source files that need updating.
description: Small Express report preview service that builds saved dashboard metric objects.

vulnerabilities.description: User-controlled report metric data reaches eval and is executed as JavaScript code.
JSON.stringify is used as an attempted sanitizer before generated JavaScript is evaluated.
